explicitInput.esqlQuery:
TS metrics-collectortelemetry.otel.otel-*
| STATS BY service.instance.id, service.name 
| EVAL identifier = CONCAT(service.instance.id, " (",service.name,")")
| KEEP identifier
| STATS BY identifier
| STATS identifiers = VALUES(identifier)
| EVAL identifiers = MV_APPEND(identifiers, "--ALL--")
| MV_EXPAND identifiers
| RENAME identifiers AS identifier
| SORT identifier
explicitInput.title: instance

query.esql:
TS metrics-collectortelemetry.otel.otel-*
| WHERE otelcol_processor_tail_sampling_sampling_traces_on_memory IS NOT NULL
| KEEP @timestamp, otelcol_processor_tail_sampling_sampling_traces_on_memory, service.instance.id, service.name
| EVAL _collector = CONCAT(service.instance.id, " (", service.name, ")")
| WHERE ?instance == "--ALL--" OR _collector == ?instance
| STATS traces_on_memory = MEDIAN(otelcol_processor_tail_sampling_sampling_traces_on_memory)
| KEEP traces_on_memory

TS metrics-collectortelemetry.otel.otel-*
| WHERE otelcol_processor_tail_sampling_sampling_traces_on_memory IS NOT NULL
| KEEP @timestamp, otelcol_processor_tail_sampling_sampling_traces_on_memory, service.instance.id, service.name
| EVAL _collector = CONCAT(service.instance.id, " (", service.name, ")")
| WHERE ?instance == "--ALL--" OR _collector == ?instance
| STATS traces_on_memory = MEDIAN(otelcol_processor_tail_sampling_sampling_traces_on_memory)
| KEEP traces_on_memory

embeddableConfig.description: Single-number view of buffered traces (same gauge as time series above).

query.esql:
TS metrics-collectortelemetry.otel.otel-*
| WHERE otelcol_processor_tail_sampling_new_trace_id_received IS NOT NULL
| KEEP @timestamp, otelcol_processor_tail_sampling_new_trace_id_received, service.instance.id, service.name
| EVAL _collector = CONCAT(service.instance.id, " (", service.name, ")")
| WHERE ?instance == "--ALL--" OR _collector == ?instance
| KEEP @timestamp, otelcol_processor_tail_sampling_new_trace_id_received, service.instance.id
| STATS new_traces_per_sec = SUM(RATE(otelcol_processor_tail_sampling_new_trace_id_received)) BY Time = BUCKET(@timestamp, 100, ?_tstart, ?_tend), service.instance.id

TS metrics-collectortelemetry.otel.otel-*
| WHERE otelcol_processor_tail_sampling_global_count_traces_sampled IS NOT NULL
| WHERE decision == "sampled"
| KEEP @timestamp, otelcol_processor_tail_sampling_global_count_traces_sampled, service.instance.id, service.name
| EVAL _collector = CONCAT(service.instance.id, " (", service.name, ")")
| WHERE ?instance == "--ALL--" OR _collector == ?instance
| EVAL series_label = _collector
| KEEP @timestamp, otelcol_processor_tail_sampling_global_count_traces_sampled, series_label
| STATS global_trace_decisions_per_sec = SUM(RATE(otelcol_processor_tail_sampling_global_count_traces_sampled)) BY Time = BUCKET(@timestamp, 100, ?_tstart, ?_tend), series_label
